overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Linux File Integrity Monitoring integration uses the Auditbeat FIM module to monitor file and directory changes in real-time. By tracking file creation, modification, deletion, and permission changes, it helps you detect unauthorized modifications, meet compliance requirements, and implement security auditing.

items.title: Real-time Monitoring
items.description: Instant detection of file changes using inotify/fsnotify

items.title: Hash Verification
items.description: Calculate MD5/SHA256 hash values to detect file tampering

items.title: Change Detail Tracking
items.description: Record specific change content: permissions, owner, size

items.title: Recursive Monitoring
items.description: Support recursive monitoring of entire directory trees

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: File change events will be parsed into the following structured fields:

tips.title: Performance Considerations
tips.content: Enabling real-time monitoring on directories with large numbers of files may affect performance. It's recommended to monitor only important system and configuration directories.
